notes: Portugal had no confirmed injuries or suspensions, with Roberto Martinez fielding a fully fit squad; rotation saw Leao and Conceicao benched in favour of Pedro Neto and Bernardo Silva. DR Congo had no confirmed injuries or suspensions either, though their pre-tournament concern was squad cohesion rather than fitness, and Bakambu's recent club form at Real Betis was noted as limited.
home_scorers: Cristiano Ronaldo (leading striker, sixth World Cup, penalty taker)
Bruno Fernandes (attacking midfielder, 29 international goals, set-piece threat)
João Neves (box-to-box midfielder, set-piece delivery and late runs)
away_scorers: Yoane Wissa (main striker, Newcastle forward, counter-attack threat)
Cédric Bakambu (experienced forward, 70 caps, 21 international goals)
Chancel Mbemba (centre-back, aerial set-piece threat, over 100 caps)
